results.title: BaseRT Review - AI Tool Features and Tips
results.content:
## Who’s BaseRT For? Empowering On-Device AI Engineers

BaseRT is meticulously crafted for the engineer, developer, and AI enthusiast who values performance, privacy, and control. If you’re building on-device AI applications, experimenting with open-source models, or simply demand the fastest possible local LLM experience on your Apple Silicon hardware, BaseRT is your indispensable tool. Join a growing community of builders pushing the boundaries of local AI.

## Top Alternatives to BaseRT

Let’s explore and discover the best alternatives and similar tools to BaseRT, carefully selected and ranked based on functionality, reliability, and user experience.

OpenMarkdown preview OpenMarkdown  RecordMeeting preview RecordMeeting  nudge2.0 preview nudge2.0 [...] AI Tool Archive Logo

1. Home
2. AI Productivity
3. BaseRT Review

# BaseRT Review

Last modified: |  Fred Magni

Dive into the future of local AI with BaseRT, the definitive performance champion for Large Language Models on Apple Silicon. Forget cloud dependencies and API costs; BaseRT empowers you to run advanced LLMs directly on your device, delivering unparalleled speed and complete data privacy. It’s purpose-built to obliterate performance bottlenecks, making your local AI experience dramatically faster.

BaseRT Review

Visit Website  Have an AI Tool? Submit it here! [...] Visit Website  Have an AI Tool? Submit it here!

The benchmarks speak for themselves. BaseRT isn’t just a marginal improvement; it’s a paradigm shift in local LLM execution. It achieves staggering speedups against industry standards, turning your Apple Silicon machine into a formidable AI powerhouse.

|  |  |
 --- |
| Benchmark (Tokens/sec) | BaseRT vs. Competitors |
| Prefill: Qwen3 30B-A3B (pp128) | 2,478 (+94% vs MLX, 6.4x vs llama.cpp) |
| Decode: Qwen3 0.6B (tg128Q4) | 531 (+33% vs MLX, +38% vs llama.cpp) |
| Prefill: Gemma 4 E2B (pp2048) | 16,264 (+32% vs MLX, 6.4x vs llama.cpp) |

## Core Capabilities: Unleashing Local LLMs

results.title: European web analytics services | European Alternatives
results.content:
Read more

Mouseflow logo

## Mouseflow

Flag of Denmark Denmark EU  Free plan

Website

Mouseflow is a web analytics service from Denmark. They offer features like heatmaps, session replay and a feedback system.

Read more

Dreamdata logo

## Dreamdata

Flag of Denmark Denmark EU

Website

Dreamdata is a web analytics service from Denmark with a focus on combining revenue related data from different sources like CRM systems, ad services ect..

Read more

Matomo by Stackhero logo

## Matomo by Stackhero

Flag of France FranceEU  EU hosted   Open source

Website

"Matomo by Stackhero" is a managed Matomo service from France provided by Stackhero.

Matomo is a powerful open source web analytics platform. [...] Flag of Germany Germany EU  EU hosted

Website

Wide Angle Analytics is a web analytics service from Germany with a focus on privacy. The service claims to be GDPR compliant and is hosted in the EU. It is possible to configure a custom domain and you can choose whether to use cookies or not. Wide Angle Analytics offers integration guides for many platforms like WordPress, Squarespace, Wix, Ghost and many more. The product is hosted in Europe.

Read more

TelemetryDeck logo

## TelemetryDeck

Flag of Germany Germany EU  Free plan

Website

TelemetryDeck is an app and web analytics service from Germany. They offer SDKs for Android, iOS and JavaScript applications. The data is not displayed on the web as with most analytics services, but in an iOS or macOS app.

Read more

Mouseflow logo [...] ## nilly

Flag of Switzerland SwitzerlandEFTA

Website

nilly is a privacy-first web analytics service from Switzerland. They are cookieless, lightweight (less than 1kB) and - thanks to their privacy-by-design approach - compliant with all data privacy laws (like the GDPR, FADP, CCPA, PECR etc.). nilly offers a WordPress plugin and integrates with all other platforms with just one line of code.

Read more

etracker logo

## etracker

Flag of Germany Germany EU  EU hosted

Website

etracker is a German web analytics platform that supports consent free and cookie less tracking and offer an integrated consent- and tag manager.

Read more
